entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop affected by dry root rot disease

entities.name: DRY ROOT ROT
entities.description: A soil-borne disease that causes significant yield loss in chickpea

entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes dry root rot

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: The region where dry root rot is becoming severe in chickpea growing areas

entities.name: BIO-CONTROL AGENTS
entities.description: Biological agents used as a management strategy to control dry root rot

entities.name: FUNGICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents used as a management strategy to control dry root rot

entities.name: YIELDS
entities.description: The productivity of the chickpea crop, which is reduced by dry root rot

entities.name: INTEGRATED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The combined approach of using various strategies to manage dry root rot
